# VM Scenarios

<!-- Generated by scripts/validate-scenarios.sh — do not edit by hand. -->

| Scenario | Severity | Est. | Difficulty | Summary |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [CPU Runaway](cpu-runaway/) | 3 | 20m | beginner | A runaway process pegs CPU above 85%, starving the IIS workload of compute. |
| [Disk Full (C: Pressure)](disk-full/) | 2 | 25m | beginner | A runaway process fills C:\Temp until free space drops below 10%, degrading the IIS workload. |
| [IIS App Pool Failure](iis-app-pool/) | 2 | 20m | beginner | The IIS application pool is stopped, returning 503s until the pool is restarted. |
